allow:
Bash(TUNNEL="https://daughters-gras-rangers-average.trycloudflare.com"
echo "=== Testing tunnel ===" && curl -s "$TUNNEL/api/health" 2>&1 | python3 -m json.tool && echo "" && echo "=== Agent count via tunnel ===" && curl -s "$TUNNEL/api/status" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Agents: {len\(d.get\(\\"agents\\",[]\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Build mode: {d.get\(\\"build_mode\\"\)}'\)
active = sum\(1 for a in d.get\('agents',[]\) if a.get\('status'\) in \('active','busy'\)\)
print\(f'Active: {active}'\)
")

Bash(TUNNEL="https://expectations-blonde-managed-unity.trycloudflare.com"
echo "=== Tunnel test ===" && curl -s "$TUNNEL/api/health" 2>&1 && echo "" && echo "=== Agent data via tunnel ===" && curl -s "$TUNNEL/api/status" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Agents: {len\(d.get\(\\"agents\\",[]\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Build mode: {d.get\(\\"build_mode\\"\)}'\)
for a in d.get\('agents',[]\)[:5]:
    print\(f'  {a.get\(\\"emoji\\",\\"?\\"\)} {a.get\(\\"id\\",\\"?\\"\):15s} {a.get\(\\"status\\",\\"?\\"\):8s} {a.get\(\\"task\\",\\"\\"\)[:50]}'\)
print\('  ...'\)
")

Bash(TUNNEL="https://forecast-agrees-conferencing-updated.trycloudflare.com"
echo "=== Full test via tunnel ===" && curl -s "$TUNNEL/api/status" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
agents = d.get\('agents',[]\)
active = sum\(1 for a in agents if a.get\('status'\) in \('active','busy'\)\)
idle = sum\(1 for a in agents if a.get\('status'\) in \('idle','stopped'\)\)
print\(f'Agents: {len\(agents\)} \({active} active, {idle} idle\)'\)
print\(f'Delegations: {len\(d.get\(\\"active_delegations\\",[]\)\)}'\)
for a in agents[:5]:
    print\(f'  {a.get\(\\"emoji\\",\\"?\\"\)} {a.get\(\\"id\\",\\"?\\"\):15s} {a.get\(\\"status\\",\\"?\\"\):8s} {a.get\(\\"task\\",\\"\\"\)[:50]}'\)
print\('  ... and', len\(agents\)-5, 'more'\)
")
Bash(xargs -I{} echo "{} data source modules" grep -c "@app.get" /Users/secondmind/space-osint/server.py)
Bash(xargs -I{} printf "  BACKEND MODULES:   {} modules\\n" grep -c "@app.get" /Users/secondmind/space-osint/server.py)
Bash(xargs -I{} printf "  API ENDPOINTS:     {} endpoints\\n" grep -c 'data-page=' /Users/secondmind/space-osint/static/index.html)
Bash(xargs -I{} printf "  DASHBOARD TABS:    {} tabs\\n" wc -l /Users/secondmind/space-osint/static/js/pages.js)
